ddls:
CREATE TABLE "curriculum_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum standard */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area associated with the standard (e.g., History, ELA) */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the standard is applicable */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand indicating the category of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the standard */,
  "common_core_standard" TEXT /* Common Core standard ID associated with this standard */,
  "learning_objective" TEXT /* Specific learning objective associated with the standard */,
  "instructional_strategy" TEXT /* Recommended instructional strategy for teaching the standard */,
  "common_core_standard_url" TEXT /* URL for the corresponding Common Core standard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Educator who created the standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the standard was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Educator who last updated the standard */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curriculum standard being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., formative, summative) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the assessment, including student performance insights */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score achievable for the assessment */,
  "assessment_format" TEXT /* Format of the assessment (e.g., multiple-choice, essay) */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for completing the assessment */,
  "num_questions" INTEGER /* Number of questions in the assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Educator who created the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Educator who last updated the assessment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES curriculum_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the educator (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "subject_specialty" TEXT /* Subject area of specialty for the educator */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the educator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or school where the educator is based */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment taken */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the student who took the assessment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student on the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback regarding the student's performance */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number for the assessment (in case of multiple attempts) */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the assessment (e.g., Completed, Incomplete) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curriculum_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, deletion, addition) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_changes_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES curriculum_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of all students who took the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or insights derived from the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "published_by" INTEGER /* Educator who published the report */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
